series_metadata.series_title: Final Denials/Revocations of Permit and Final Transfer Orders
series_metadata.series_description: Records include Letters of Denial, Letters of Revocation, Transfer Orders, Closure Orders, supporting documentation and correspondence use by the Division to make these determinations.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Keep for five years unless licensee or permittee is involved in litigation with the Division. In which case, keep for two years after all administrative ,civil, or criminal action is complete then destroy ; Paper: Keep for five years unless licensee or permittee is involved in litigation with the Division. In which case, keep for two years after all administrative ,civil, or criminal action is complete then destroy, Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Wastepaper
